meta.project: Sistem Informasi Terintegrasi Absensi & SPK Siswa Terbaik

product_overview: Web application to digitize school attendance and compute an objective 'Siswa Terbaik' ranking using configurable SPK criteria. Provides role-based dashboards for Admin, Guru, and Siswa to manage master data, record attendance, configure SPK weights, and view leaderboards.
core_goals: Allow teachers to record daily attendance for their assigned classes quickly and in bulk.
Enable admins to manage master data (students, teachers, classes, subjects) and configure SPK criteria weights.
Automatically compute and present ranked leaderboards (SPK) so staff and students can see performance results.
Provide students a read-only view of their attendance stats, monthly charts, and class leaderboard position.
Support bulk student import/export to accelerate initial setup and administrative tasks.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users using NIP/NIS and password and redirect them to their role-specific dashboard (Admin, Guru, Siswa).
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill NIP/NIS input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> Be redirected to role-specific dashboard (e.g., /admin or /guru or /siswa) -> See dashboard appropriate to role
Navigate to /login -> Fill NIP/NIS input field with incorrect value or wrong password -> Submit login form -> See validation error about invalid credentials

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provide admins a summary view of totals, today's attendance percentage, active semester, weekly attendance chart, and quick access to SPK and student import actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> See stat cards for total students, total teachers, today's attendance percentage, and active semester -> View weekly attendance bar chart -> Use a quick action to open student import or SPK configuration -> See top 5 SPK leaderboard and optionally navigate to full leaderboard at /admin/leaderboard

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Admins can view, search, add, edit, delete students and import students in bulk from an Excel file.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/siswa -> View student list table -> Search students by name or NIS -> Open add-student form -> Fill required student data -> Submit form -> See new student in list
Navigate to /admin/siswa -> View student list table -> Open edit form for a student -> Modify student data -> Save changes -> See updated student in list
Navigate to /admin/siswa -> View student list table -> Trigger delete on a student -> Confirm deletion -> See student removed from list
Navigate to /admin/siswa -> Open import students workflow -> Upload Excel file with student rows -> Confirm import -> See imported students in list
Navigate to /admin/siswa -> Open import students workflow -> Upload file with unsupported format or invalid columns -> Confirm upload -> See validation error about file format or missing columns

features.name: Teacher Management
features.description: Admins can view, search, add, edit, and delete teacher records.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/guru -> View teacher list -> Search teachers by name or NIP -> Open add-teacher form -> Fill teacher data -> Submit form -> See new teacher in list
Navigate to /admin/guru -> View teacher list -> Open edit form for a teacher -> Modify data -> Save changes -> See updated teacher in list
Navigate to /admin/guru -> View teacher list -> Delete a teacher -> Confirm deletion -> See teacher removed from list

features.name: Attendance Recording (Guru)
features.description: Teachers record daily attendance for students in the classes they are assigned to, selecting statuses and submitting daily records.
user_flows: Navigate to /guru/absensi -> Select class -> Select date for attendance -> Mark attendance status for each student in the class -> Submit attendance -> See confirmation that attendance was recorded
Navigate to /guru/absensi -> Select class -> Select date -> Attempt to submit with missing attendance markings where required -> See validation prompt to complete required attendance entries

features.name: SPK Configuration
features.description: Admins can view and edit SPK criteria weights that drive the Student Performance Key calculations.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/spk -> View list of SPK criteria and current weights -> Edit one or more criteria weights -> Save updated weights -> See confirmation and updated weights reflected in the list

Navigate to /admin/spk -> Edit criteria weights so they do not meet expected validation rules (e.g., invalid total percentage) -> Attempt to save -> See validation error instructing to correct weights

features.name: Leaderboard
features.description: Display ranked students based on SPK calculation results with filtering and export capabilities.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/leaderboard -> View leaderboard table with rank, name, class, and SPK score -> Filter results by class -> See filtered ranking
Navigate to /admin/leaderboard -> View leaderboard table -> Export current leaderboard view to PDF -> See or download exported PDF
Navigate to /siswa/leaderboard -> View class leaderboard and individual rank in context

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Students can view their attendance summary, monthly attendance chart, and their class leaderboard performance.
user_flows: Navigate to /siswa -> See profile card with NIS, class, and avatar -> View attendance percentage and counts for hadir/tidak hadir -> View monthly attendance area chart -> View top 5 class leaderboard

features.name: Teacher Dashboard
features.description: Teachers see assigned classes, attendance status overview, and quick access to start attendance or view recaps.
user_flows: Navigate to /guru -> View stat cards for total classes, classes already attended today, and average attendance -> View assigned class cards with today's attendance status -> Start attendance for a class to open the attendance recording workflow -> Navigate to /guru/rekap to view attendance recap

routes.description: Login page with username (NIP/NIS) and password authentication
Admin dashboard with stats, weekly attendance chart, top 5 leaderboard
Admin leaderboard view with SPK calculation results
Teacher dashboard with class list and attendance status
Teacher attendance recording for assigned classes
Student dashboard with attendance stats, chart, and class leaderboard

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with username (NIP/NIS) and password, role-based redirect to admin/guru/siswa dashboard
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Auto-redirect to role-specific dashboard on success

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Overview dashboard with total students, teachers, today attendance percentage, active semester, weekly attendance chart, and top 5 SPK leaderboard
user_interactions: View stat cards (total siswa, guru, kehadiran hari ini, semester aktif)
Click quick action buttons (Import Siswa, Atur Bobot SPK, Lihat Leaderboard)
Click Lihat Semua to navigate to full leaderboard

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Admin can view, add, edit, delete students. Supports bulk import via Excel.
user_interactions: Search students by name or NIS
Add new student via form dialog

features.name: Teacher Management
features.description: Admin can manage teacher data (CRUD operations)

features.name: Attendance Recording (Guru)
features.description: Teachers record daily attendance for their assigned classes
user_interactions: Mark attendance status (Hadir/Izin/Sakit/Alfa) for each student

features.name: SPK Configuration
features.description: Admin configures criteria weights for the Student Performance Key (SPK) decision support system

features.name: Leaderboard
features.description: View ranked students based on SPK calculation results
user_interactions: View leaderboard table with rank, name, class, SPK score

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Student views their own attendance stats, monthly chart, and class leaderboard
user_interactions: View profile card with NIS, class, and avatar
View attendance percentage, total hadir, tidak hadir stats

features.name: Teacher Dashboard
features.description: Guru views assigned classes with attendance status
user_interactions: View stat cards (total kelas, sudah diabsen, rata-rata kehadiran)
View assigned class cards with today's attendance status
Click Mulai Absensi to start recording attendance
Click Rekap to view attendance recap
